meaning: n.[药]二硫四甲秋兰姆,福美双,双硫胺甲酰(杀菌药)
examples: The protective fungicide is at least one of zineb, propineb, thioneb, thiram and chlorothalonil.
Thiram is a highly toxic chemical which the EPA examined and deemed to be so dangerous that agricultural workers are now mandated to wear protective clothing when handling them.
The invention relates to a bactericidal composition with active ingredients to be pyrazole-kresoxim-methyl and thiram, and belongs to the bactericidal composition pesticide technology field.
